description_long: This object is a short, straight-bladed sword with a double-edged, pointed blade made of dark metal. The blade is robust and tapers to a sharp tip, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a brown material for grip, and ends in a hexagonal pommel. A prominent, angular guard separates the blade from the handle, providing hand protection. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, suggesting a focus on function over form. The color palette is dominated by dark metallic and brown tones, giving it a rugged, practical appearance.
description: A short, double-edged sword with a dark metal blade, brown wrapped handle, and angular guard. The design is functional and unadorned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade and the brown-wrapped handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed blade tip and the width of the angular guard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and handle details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle's end and the thickness of the guard.
